changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO JOB_POSTING (ID, TITLE, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, REQUIRED_SKILLS, EXPERIENCE_YEARS, LOCATION, SALARY_MIN, SALARY_MAX, STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_JOB_POSTING.NEXTVAL, 'Senior Java Developer', 'Engineering', 'We are looking for a Senior Java Developer to join our growing backend team and build scalable microservices.', 'Java, Spring Boot, Oracle, Microservices, REST APIs, Docker', 5, 'Dubai, UAE', 20000, 30000, 'OPEN')

INSERT INTO JOB_POSTING (ID, TITLE, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, REQUIRED_SKILLS, EXPERIENCE_YEARS, LOCATION, SALARY_MIN, SALARY_MAX, STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_JOB_POSTING.NEXTVAL, 'HR Business Partner', 'Human Resources', 'Experienced HR partner to lead talent acquisition and people strategy across departments.', 'Recruitment, HR Policies, HRIS, Oracle HCM, Communication', 3, 'Abu Dhabi, UAE', 15000, 22000, 'OPEN')

INSERT INTO JOB_POSTING (ID, TITLE, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, REQUIRED_SKILLS, EXPERIENCE_YEARS, LOCATION, SALARY_MIN, SALARY_MAX, STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_JOB_POSTING.NEXTVAL, 'DevOps Engineer', 'Engineering', 'Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes clusters, and cloud infrastructure.', 'Kubernetes, Docker, Jenkins, AWS, Terraform, Linux', 4, 'Dubai, UAE', 18000, 26000, 'OPEN')

changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO CANDIDATE (ID, CND_REF_NO, FULL_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, NATIONALITY, SKILLS, EXPERIENCE_YEARS, EDUCATION, CURRENT_ROLE) VALUES (SEQ_CANDIDATE.NEXTVAL, 'CND_' || SEQ_CANDIDATE.CURRVAL, 'Ahmed Al-Rashid', 'ahmed.rashid@example.com', '+971501234567', 'UAE', 'Java, Spring Boot, Oracle, REST APIs, Docker', 6, 'BSc Computer Science, UAE University', 'Backend Developer at TechCorp')

INSERT INTO CANDIDATE (ID, CND_REF_NO, FULL_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, NATIONALITY, SKILLS, EXPERIENCE_YEARS, EDUCATION, CURRENT_ROLE) VALUES (SEQ_CANDIDATE.NEXTVAL, 'CND_' || SEQ_CANDIDATE.CURRVAL, 'Sara Al-Mansoori', 'sara.mansoori@example.com', '+971509876543', 'UAE', 'Recruitment, HR Policies, Oracle HCM, HRIS', 4, 'BA Human Resources, Zayed University', 'HR Specialist at GlobalCo')

changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO APPLICATION (ID, APP_REF_NO, CANDIDATE_ID, JOB_POSTING_ID, STATUS, APPLIED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_APPLICATION.NEXTVAL, 'APP_' || SEQ_APPLICATION.CURRVAL, (SELECT ID FROM CANDIDATE WHERE EMAIL = 'ahmed.rashid@example.com'), (SELECT ID FROM JOB_POSTING WHERE TITLE = 'Senior Java Developer'), 'APPLIED', SYSTIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO APPLICATION (ID, APP_REF_NO, CANDIDATE_ID, JOB_POSTING_ID, STATUS, APPLIED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_APPLICATION.NEXTVAL, 'APP_' || SEQ_APPLICATION.CURRVAL, (SELECT ID FROM CANDIDATE WHERE EMAIL = 'sara.mansoori@example.com'), (SELECT ID FROM JOB_POSTING WHERE TITLE = 'HR Business Partner'), 'APPLIED', SYSTIMESTAMP)

changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO APP_ROLE (ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (SEQ_APP_ROLE.NEXTVAL, 'ROLE_ADMIN', 'Full system access')
INSERT INTO APP_ROLE (ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (SEQ_APP_ROLE.NEXTVAL, 'ROLE_RECRUITER', 'HR recruiter access')

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM APP_ROLE WHERE NAME IN ('ROLE_ADMIN', 'ROLE_RECRUITER')

changeSet.author: hr-dev

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APP_USER WHERE USERNAME = 'admin'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO APP_USER (ID, USERNAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH, FULL_NAME, ENABLED, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_APP_USER.NEXTVAL, 'admin', 'admin@hr-agent.com', '$2a$12$TwjWoMPTQoJFKl/GhvXo4.bxIXwsmhHCjSvVuwrHhB3SWbPsFW1Dq', 'System Administrator', 1, SYSTIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO USER_ROLE (USER_ID, ROLE_ID) SELECT u.ID, r.ID FROM APP_USER u CROSS JOIN APP_ROLE r WHERE u.USERNAME = 'admin' AND r.NAME = 'ROLE_ADMIN'
